# QA Plan: Sprint 1 — Core Layer Close (Encounter Zone + Drop System)
**Date**: 2026-07-17
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 17 stories across 2 systems (Encounter Zone, Drop System)
**Engine**: Godot 4.7 (GUT test framework)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-1.md`

> **Note on provenance**: Every Logic/Integration story in this sprint already
> carries an inline `## QA Test Cases` section authored from GDD AC fixtures during
> `/create-stories`. **Those inline cases are the authoritative per-AC specs** — the
> developer implements against them. This plan is the sprint-level rollup (test
> allocation, edge-case emphasis, smoke scope, DoD) required by the Production →
> Polish gate; it does not restate every Given/When/Then already in the stories.

---

**Allocation**: 14 Logic (unit) · 2 Integration · 1 Config/Data. No Visual/Feel or UI
stories — the sprint is pure-core, so coverage is automation-first with a thin
smoke/manual layer.

---

## Automated Tests Required

### Encounter Zone

#### EZ-1 Zone data model & EZ-1 encounter trigger — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/ez1_encounter_trigger_test.gd`
**What to test**: `ZoneDef`/`TerrainPatch`/`SpawnEntry`/`BossEncounter` value types round-trip; EZ-1 step-based encounter trigger fires against an **injected seeded RNG** (never global `randf()`); terrain-keyed patch selection. Covers AC-EZ-01/02/03/57/59.
**Edge cases**: zero-step / boundary step counts; empty zone; injected-seed reproducibility of the trigger.
**Estimated test count**: ~6–8 unit tests.

#### EZ-2 Weighted enemy selection — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/ez2_weighted_selection_test.gd`
**What to test**: EZ-2 weighted walk over `SpawnEntry` weights with the injected seeded RNG; cumulative-weight boundaries; a fixed seed selects a deterministic enemy sequence. Covers AC-EZ-04–09.
**Edge cases**: single-entry pool (weight is the whole mass); a zero-weight entry (never selected); a draw landing exactly on a cumulative boundary.
**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests.

#### EZ-3 Sub-pool validation & empty-pool sentinel — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/ez2_subpool_validation_test.gd`
**What to test**: `filter_valid` exclusions (unknown enemy ID, disabled entry); the **empty-pool sentinel** return path (no crash, sentinel not a live encounter); LogSink `warn(code, detail)` on excluded entries. Covers AC-EZ-26–30/32/33.
**Edge cases**: all entries invalid → sentinel; mixed valid/invalid; unknown-key logged-and-skipped (never crash).
**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests.

#### EZ-4 WILD/BOSS encounter handoff to TBC — Integration
**Test file**: `tests/integration/encounter_zone/tbc_handoff_test.gd`
**What to test**: the resolved WILD/BOSS encounter is handed to a **stub** BattleController seam (no live scene); the payload shape TBC expects is populated. Covers AC-EZ-15.
**Edge cases**: WILD path vs BOSS path both hand off; sentinel/empty pool does **not** trigger a handoff.
**Estimated test count**: ~3 integration tests.

#### EZ-5 Boss gate WIN_COUNT first-access & sequencing — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/boss_gate_wincount_test.gd`
**What to test**: WIN_COUNT threshold gating; `requires_defeated` sequencing; first-access transition; the reserved/broken-ref **fail-safe LOCKED** path. Covers AC-EZ-16–20/40a/56/58.
**Edge cases**: count exactly at threshold vs one below; missing prerequisite; broken `requires_defeated` ref → LOCKED, not crash.
**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests.

#### EZ-6 Repeat policy — LIGHTER_REGATE & ALWAYS_OPEN — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/repeat_policy_test.gd`
**What to test**: LIGHTER_REGATE delta re-gate arithmetic (post-clear threshold delta); ALWAYS_OPEN never re-gates. Covers AC-EZ-21/22/23/39/52.
**Edge cases**: first clear vs subsequent re-gate; delta of zero; ALWAYS_OPEN after a clear.
**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests.

#### EZ-7 Gate params validation & reserved-gate fail-safe — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/gate_params_validation_test.gd`
**What to test**: gate-parameter validation (range/required fields); reserved gate_type fail-safe to a safe default. Covers AC-EZ-24/25/31/34–38.
**Edge cases**: out-of-range param; missing required param; unknown/reserved gate_type → fail-safe (logged, not crash).
**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests.

#### EZ-8 Content-validation linters — Config/Data
**Test file**: `tests/unit/encounter_zone/content_validation_test.gd`
**What to test**: offline linters over **fixtures** (the real zone `.tres` is a deferred content pass): dangling enemy IDs, malformed weights, broken boss refs. Covers AC-EZ-10–14/47–51/54 (11 ADVISORY ACs).
**Edge cases**: clean fixture passes; each malformed fixture fails with the correct diagnostic code.
**Estimated test count**: ~11 checks (one per lint rule).

### Drop System

#### DS-1 DropSystem host, VICTORY trigger & DS-1 roll core — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/ds1_roll_core_test.gd`
**What to test**: RefCounted host + DI seams (injected seeded RNG, LogSink, Part/Enemy-DB reader, Inventory sink); VICTORY-only single-pass resolution; canonical DS-1 `clamp(base × level_mult × Π(cond) × beacon, 0, 1)` with level/beacon factors present defaulting to 1.0; emit at `upgrade_tier=0`. Covers AC-DS-03/04/05/11/20/27.
**Edge cases**: non-VICTORY → no resolution; clamp at 0 and at 1; strict `<` draw boundary (draw == rate → no drop).
**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests.

#### DS-2 Condition assembly — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/condition_assembly_test.gd`
**What to test**: exact-string condition match; multiplicative stacking; unknown-key logged + skipped (multiplier not applied); outcome-fact multipliers. Covers AC-DS-22/23/07/25.
**Edge cases**: no conditions (product = 1.0); two stacking conditions; unknown key mid-set (skipped, others still apply).
**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests.

#### DS-3 Pool iteration — dedup, independent rolls, empty pool — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/pool_iteration_test.gd`
**What to test**: unique-ID dedup (one roll per ID, no ÷pool_size); `drop_enabled` exclusion; empty/disabled pool → no draws. Covers AC-DS-12/08/06.
**Edge cases**: duplicate IDs collapse to one roll; all-disabled pool; empty pool → zero RNG calls.
**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests.

#### DS-4 Prototype gradient pity (DS-2) — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/prototype_pity_test.gd`
**What to test**: credit threshold `N_PROTO_PITY × C`; **pre-roll** guarantee skips the draw; `+= c` on qualifying fail; reset on any drop. Covers AC-DS-13/14/29/15.
**Edge cases**: counter at threshold−c vs threshold; guarantee consumes 0 RNG calls; reset after natural drop below threshold.
**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests.

#### DS-5 Boss-grade deterministic floor pity (DS-3) — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/boss_grade_pity_test.gd`
**What to test**: `M_BOSS_PITY = 8` boundary (fires at 8, not 7); `+= 1` increment; no-increment without a qualifying break; reset on natural drop; per-part-ID isolation; emit contract; `drop_enabled` gates the pity update (both negative and positive companion). Covers AC-DS-16/17/09/30/24/01/26.
**Edge cases**: counter 7 vs 8; two Boss-grade parts at threshold guarantee independently with 0 draws; disabled part's counter does not advance, enabled part's does.
**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests.

#### DS-6 Determinism — order, stream-sync, reproducibility — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/determinism_test.gd`
**What to test**: ID-ascending roll order == report order; multi-guarantee stream-sync (guaranteed parts consume 0 draws); same-seed + same pity maps → identical drop list AND identical post-state on **both** maps; defeat/flee → no emits, no pity change, RNG untouched. Covers AC-DS-21/10/18/02.
**Edge cases**: two simultaneous guarantees (stream-position discriminator); two instances reproduce identically (no shared static state); DEFEAT then FLED both no-op.
**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests.

#### DS-7 Beacon (×2.0) & DS-F-LEVEL rate injection — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/beacon_level_injection_test.gd`
**What to test**: Beacon ×2.0 on VICTORY-with-Beacon; DS-F-LEVEL `level_rarity_mult` (only Rare scaled 0.5/1.0/1.5; Prototype row stays 1.0); clamp to 1.0; flee → no injection; a pity-guaranteed part ignores the Beacon. Covers AC-DS-31.
**Edge cases**: MID vs HIGH band discriminator (0.50 vs 0.75); Common clamps to 1.0; flee spends Beacon with no effect; guaranteed part drops once, no multiplier applied.
**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests (Scenarios A/A2/B/C/D).

#### DS-8 Scrap yield & rarity-ordering invariant — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/drop_system/scrap_yield_test.gd`
**What to test**: exact yields (Common 5 / Rare 20 / Prototype 35 / Boss-grade 60); the three ordering booleans evaluated **programmatically** (`COMMON < RARE < PROTOTYPE < BOSS_GRADE`). Covers AC-DS-19.
**Edge cases**: any inverted step (e.g. Prototype ≥ Boss-grade) fails the build.
**Estimated test count**: ~7 assertions (4 value + 3 ordering).

#### DS-9 Pity-counter persistence across save/load — Integration — **BLOCKED**
**Test file**: `tests/integration/drop_system/pity_persistence_test.gd`
**What to test** (when unblocked): both pity maps serialize → teardown → reload identical; a post-reload advance uses `+= c`/`+= 1` from the *restored* value; the next qualifying attempt fires the guarantee. Covers AC-DS-28 (**release-blocker**).
**Blocked on**: the Not-Started Save/Load system (ADR-0001) must define the pity-map serialization interface. Do not schedule test authoring until Save/Load lands.
**Estimated test count**: ~3 integration tests.

---

## Manual QA Checklist

No Visual/Feel or UI stories this sprint — nearly all verification is automated.
The only manual layer:

### EZ-8 Content-validation linters — Config/Data
**Verification method**: spot-check against real content *when authored* (deferred — the real zone `.tres` needs the ~8-WILD roster + Art Bible terrain enum, OQ-EZ-1).
**Who must sign off**: game-designer (content correctness) once the real zone exists.
**Evidence to capture**: linter output over the real `.tres` (0 errors) in a `production/qa/smoke-*.md` entry.
Checklist:
- [ ] Linters pass over fixtures (automated — this sprint).
- [ ] Linters run clean over the real zone `.tres` (deferred content pass — not this sprint).

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for this sprint (run `/smoke-check sprint`):

1. Project boots headless without script/compile errors (`godot --headless` clean).
2. Full GUT suite runs green (baseline 762/762; must rise by exactly the count of new tests added — watch for silently-skipped `_test.gd`, the `class_name --import` gotcha).
3. **Encounter Zone**: an injected-seed encounter roll resolves deterministically (WILD selection + boss-gate evaluation) without touching global RNG.
4. **Drop System**: a VICTORY resolution rolls the pool once per unique ID in ID-ascending order, pity guarantees skip the draw, and emits land at `upgrade_tier=0`.
5. Determinism: a fixed injected seed reproduces the exact drop set across two DropSystem instances.
6. No new `push_warning`/`push_error` from `src/`; diagnostics go through the injected LogSink.
7. Performance: no new frame spikes (turn-based, minimal — spot-check only).

*Save/load cycle is **out of scope** this sprint — the Save/Load system is Not Started (DS-9 blocked).*

---

## Playtest Requirements

*No playtest sessions required for this sprint.* All 17 stories are pure-core Logic /
Integration / Config-Data with deterministic, fixture-backed acceptance criteria —
there is no "feel" or player-facing surface to validate subjectively. Playtesting
enters when the Presentation tier (screens, loot summary) is built.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified via automated test result (every story here is Logic/Integration/Config-Data — no manual-evidence-only stories)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path and passes (GUT green)
- [ ] New test count rose by exactly the number of tests added (guards the silent-skip gotcha)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`) before QA hand-off
- [ ] No regressions — full suite stays green
- [ ] Code reviewed (lean per-story `/code-review`)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

**Sprint-level gate**: DS-9 (AC-DS-28) is a release-blocker that **cannot** be closed
this sprint — it is deferred, not waived. The sprint can complete with DS-9 Blocked;
the *project* cannot ship until Save/Load lands and DS-9 passes.
